final.sql: SELECT t1.teigid FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_gis.teig AS t1 INNER JOIN flomsoner_92001766ec964ab8b545fef0a00e6d23.flomareal AS t2 ON ST_Intersects(t1.geom, ST_Transform(t2.omrade, 25833)) INNER JOIN stormflohavniva_fa23a1affeea4d26adf1af29afd20ef9.stormflo200ar_klimaarna AS t3 ON ST_Intersects(t1.geom, ST_Transform(t3.omrade, 25833)) WHERE t1.kommunenummer = '4201'
